cells.rationale: Subtle credential-confinement, stream replay, abort, and account-scoped transport invariants make this security- and correctness-critical provider design.
Concurrent transient-state coordination, strict schema boundaries, and daemon lifecycle integration create cross-cutting correctness and privacy invariants.
Launcher, installer, diagnostics, and documentation changes form a cross-cutting activation cascade where fail-open and secret-isolation correctness must remain exact.
